scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run check -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/server
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test:matcher -w apps/server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
